FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: AI Detects Bearish Momentum as Price Retests 100‑Hour MA
tldr_points: USD/JPY slips to fresh lows, retesting the 100‑hour moving average.
Geopolitical easing (Iran talks) and Powell probe lift risk‑on sentiment, weighing on the yen.
Technical bias remains bearish with price below MA20 and RSI showing weakening momentum.
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY declines to new lows, testing 100‑hour MA amid easing geopolitical risk and softening fundamentals.
FX.comment: USD/JPY declines to new lows, testing 100‑hour MA amid easing geopolitical risk and softening fundamentals.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] NEUTRAL: Mixed Signals Amid Sector Rotation and Geopolitical Tensions
tldr_points: Mixed signals across sectors as chip stocks face profit-taking
Long-term fundamentals remain intact for select S&P constituents
Geopolitical tensions create near-term volatility concerns
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 shows resilience amid sector rotation; technicals lack clear direction while fundamentals remain supportive.
STOCKS.comment: Awaiting directional breakout from consolidation range

CRYPTO.title: BTC/USD 市場分析
tldr_points: AI flags MA20 support as bullish catalyst
Powell-Warsh Fed shift adds upside potential
CRYPTO.excerpt: AI spots MA20 support, Powell-Warsh Fed shift, Chainlink integration as bullish catalysts for BTC/USD driving momentum.
CRYPTO.comment: AI spots MA20 support, Powell-Warsh Fed shift, Chainlink integration as bullish catalysts for BTC/USD driving momentum.
